headline: NetApp Stock Rallies Ahead Of Earnings As Data Storage Rival Everpure Chases Breakout
summary: Shares of rival data storage firms NetApp and Everpure are rallying ahead of earnings reports due Thursday.  NetApp stock broke out during Friday's session while shares of Everpure, formerly Pure Storage, are approaching an entry with early gains Tuesday.  For Everpure and NetApp, the picture has been more complicated.

headline: Is Seagate (STX) Using Debt-for-Equity Swaps to Reinforce Its AI Storage Ambitions?
summary: In recent weeks, Seagate Technology Holdings plc entered privately negotiated exchange agreements to retire US$185.91 million of 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028 using a mix of cash and ordinary shares, while insiders, including the CEO, sold shares under pre‑arranged plans amid rising AI‑related storage demand. This combination of balance sheet reshaping, insider selling, and enthusiasm around AI‑driven data center storage needs raises important questions about how sustainable the...

headline: Micron Technology Delivered 2,000% Return for One Investor as Memory Shortage Fuels AI Rally
summary: On a recent episode of the Earn Your Leisure podcast titled “The AI Boom Isn’t Over! Micron Technology Just Proved It!“, a panelist from the Market Moneys platform celebrated a multi-year call on memory that has paid off in spectacular fashion with a 2,000% personal return on Micron. headline: SanDisk Rides AI Storage Supercycle As Memory Prices Enter 'New Normal'
